---
title: "Dessert Match-Ups: Part 1"
description: |
  The sweeter of the teeth
date: '2026-06-05'
image: "desserts.jpg"
categories:
    - Food
format: html
toc: true
lightbox: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
draft: false
---

```{r}
library(here)
source(here("packages.R"))
source(here("functions.R"))

series_filter = 14

data = pollresults(series_filter)
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Fruity")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Creamy")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Layered")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Frozen")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Stuffed")
```
